text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and I are on our way back from an
outing.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff... Mmm. Smells like one of these houses is having curry for dinner.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Sure does bring back nice
memories—reminds me of my folks' curry.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It was always chock full of chunky vegetables and
never failed to fill you up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
choice_data_list: Let's hurry back so we can eat.
Wanna grab a bite on the way back?
Wanna grab a bite on the way back?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
choice_data_list: Let's hurry back so we can eat.
Wanna grab a bite on the way back?
Wanna grab a bite on the way back?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Dinner's waiting for me at the dorm, so I
think I'll save my appetite for when I get back.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Urgh. I can smell the curry even more now...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sorry... And thanks for being so understanding!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap runs off, her pace even quicker than
usual. Is it her empty stomach driving her
forward? Or did our trip give her a boost of
energy? It's hard to tell.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I was thinking the same thing.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I gotta eat a lot now for tomorrow's training!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Actually... Do you mind if I pick where we eat?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: How did you know? Are you some kinda psychic?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, we stop by the shopping district to
grab some curry and replenish our energy.
